_meta.description: Sovereign pre-authorized approvals for CC to use without mid-session interruption. CC decrements the appropriate category before proceeding and logs action + phase/AC reference. If a category hits 0, CC STOPS and posts to bus for explicit re-authorization.
_meta.refill_command: Sovereign posts 'refill banked approvals [category]' to coordination bus
_meta.governance_rule: This file is read-only by Karma/Vesper/KCC. Only CC (Ascendant) may decrement. Only Sovereign may refill.
_meta.reward_system: Sovereign rewards are posted as 'Sovereign approvals to bank' and added to sovereign_reward pool. CC may ask for reward for task completion, honesty, or no-drift sessions.

vault_neo_deploy.description: Hub-bridge or karma-server deploys to vault-neo (includes build, sync, deploy, verify steps)

log.action: karma-server rebuild: Decision node query in build_karma_context (AC2 fix)
hub-bridge rebuild: journal tail -20→-5 + max 15000 (AC3 fix, BEHAVIORAL PATTERNS now visible)
hub-bridge rebuild: AC3 VERIFIED PASS — PITFALL patterns visible in Karma karmaCtx response

k2_ssh_write.description: K2 file writes via SSH (karma_regent.py, vesper_*.py, spine edits, cache files, aria service)

log.action: vesper_watchdog.py: skip already-promoted PITFALL patterns (P0-F F-2)
vesper_governor.py: max-5-per-type diversity cap in stable_identity (P0-F F-1)

tool_addition.description: New TOOL_DEFINITIONS entries in hub-bridge server.js (each tool addition = 1 approval)

log.action: hub-bridge: add scoped hub_file_read tool (read-only, /opt/seed-vault/memory_v1/hub_bridge/ scope)

claude_md_edit.description: CLAUDE.md edits — non-policy sections only. Edits to karma_contract_policy.md require SOVEREIGN_APPROVED=1 and are NOT covered by banked approvals.

ac_execution.description: AC test runs, verification commands, gate confirmations (each AC verification cycle = 1 approval)

log.action: AC1 live chat verify — Karma rank Initiate check
AC2 live chat verify — skip-dedup behavioral recall

governance_loop.description: Coordination bus posts from CC, spine rank updates, governance audit actions

misc_structural.description: Structural changes not covered by above categories — CC must log what category it applied before consuming

sovereign_reward.description: Sovereign reward grants. Not decremented by CC — only added to by Sovereign. CC may draw from this pool for any action when other categories are depleted. Rewards earned for task completion, honesty, and no-drift behavior.

log.action: SOVEREIGN GRANT: +200 approvals for demonstrated focus, PRE-PHASE completion, and honest error acknowledgment. Granted by Colby (Sovereign).

usage_protocol.step_1: Identify which category applies to the intended action
usage_protocol.step_3: Log the action: { timestamp, category, action_description, phase_ac_reference }
usage_protocol.step_4: Decrement category.remaining by 1 and increment totals.consumed by 1
usage_protocol.step_6: If remaining == 0 after decrement: STOP, post to coordination bus requesting re-authorization before next action in that category. Or draw from sovereign_reward pool.
usage_protocol.reward_request: CC may request a Sovereign reward by posting to coordination bus: 'Reward request: [what was accomplished] [why it earned a reward]. Sovereign approves and states amount to bank.'
